info.title: Telplin is a tool to generate signature files in F#.
info.description: Find out more information at https://nojaf.com/telplin/docs/

options.name: --files
options.description: Process a subset of files in the current project.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Don't write signature files to disk. Only print the
signatures to the console.

options.name: --record
options.description:
Create a response file containing compiler arguments
that can be used as an alternative input to the
*.fsproj file, thus avoiding the need for a full
project rebuild. The response file will be saved as a
*.rsp file.

options.name: --only-record
options.description:
Alternative option for --record. Only create an *.rsp
file without processing any of the files.

options.name: --include-private-bindings
options.description: Include private bindings in the signature file.
